name: Do I need a lawyer to fight AI-related sanctions on my firm?
description: Yes, get ethics lawyer for sanctions defense.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer to fight AI-related sanctions on my firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, get ethics lawyer for sanctions defense.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, specialized ethics counsel to navigate bar, appeals, malpractice risks. Levidow needed representation post-sanction.[1] Key factors: complexity, precedents. Don't self-represent; hire early. Protects firm reputation.
